text: Tum apne dard ko daba kar bhi ghar ki shaan aur rishton ko bachane ki zimmedari le rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main bagawat nahi kar sakta. Is waqt ghar ko paisa chahiye, meri ego nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se long-standing suppression ka duration mirror karna.
text: Kaafi samay se tum khud ko side pe rakhkar sirf zimmedari mode mein chal rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kabhi kabhi lagta hai boss ke saamne pairon ki dhool ban gaya hoon. Bas survive kar raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se fear of total loss softly mirror karna.
text: Tumhe lag raha hai agar tumne resist kiya toh income, ghar ka balance aur apni jagah sab ek saath hil sakte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, isliye emotions daba deta hoon taaki khandaan ki shaan bachi rahe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se family-honor protection mirror karna.
text: Tum apni hurt ko rok kar bhi parivaar ka chehra aur rishte sambhalne ki koshish mein ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Par andar se khokla feel hota hai, jaise meri koi ahmiyat hi nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Core burden ko single focused question se clarify karna.
text: Sabse teekha kya lagta hai: boss ka nicha dikhana, loan ka bojh, ya khandaan ki shaan bachane ka pressure?

speaker: Seeker
text: Boss ka nicha dikhana sabse zyada todta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se repeated humiliation impact mirror karna.
text: Roz-roz ka yeh nicha dikhaya jana tumhari self-value ko ghis raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bolke halka laga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Relational context mein trapped/helpless emotion reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai tum phanse hue aur be-bas feel kar rahe ho - respect chahiye, par zimmedariyon ke beech khud ko daba kar chalna pad raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul be-bas wali feeling hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Family-honor and debt context mein feelings normalize karke worth separate karna.
text: Jab ghar ka loan aur shaan ka pressure saath ho, aisa tootna bilkul samajhne layak hai. Iska matlab yeh nahi ki tum kam ke ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Saans ab better lag rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Structural reframe: toxic authority behavior != personal worth.
text: Kai startup teams mein power misuse aur public put-down hota hai; yeh tumhari asli kshamata ka seedha measure nahi hota.

speaker: Seeker
text: Batao kya karoon abhi ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Once-only systemic anecdote se isolation kam karna.
text: Prep-gap ke baad startup roles mein aaye logon mein yeh pressure common hai - sirf tumhara nahi, par log bolte nahi kyunki ghar ki shaan aur paison ki majboori beech mein hoti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, simple raasta do.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness par 3 low-load practical options dena.
text: Teen short options: (1) 5 min paani + walk. (2) 7 min incident note with facts only. (3) 5 min monthly loan due list quick check.

speaker: Seeker
text: Incident note aur due list karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen step ko one-time sequence mein guide karna.
text: Pehle notes kholo. Teen points likho: trigger kya tha, tumne kya response diya, kal ka pehla controlled step kya hoga. Phir due list pe ek tick lagao. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Done. Mind thoda stable hua.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Micro-stability regain ko validate karna.
text: Bahut achha, tumne worthlessness ke loop se nikal kar practical control liya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kal ka mini plan bhi de do.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Next-day no-overload plan dena.
text: Kal mini plan: (1) Start pe 2 priority tasks set. (2) Sharp tone aaye toh bolo: "Ji, isko complete karke update deta hoon." (3) Evening mein 5 min job backup list pe ek entry add.

speaker: Seeker
text: Backup list wala practical hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Tiny template se action friction kam karna.
text: Entry template: "Role - source - next step". Sirf ek line enough hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh easy lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Micro backup planning ko practical safety net ke roop mein normalize karna.
text: Financial stress phase mein tiny backup planning nervous system ko certainty deti hai, pressure kam karti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab better feel ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Progress ko reinforce karna with dignity framing.
text: Tumne pressure ke beech bhi khud ko sambhalne ka tareeka nikala, yeh solid strength hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thoda confidence aa gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Night close ke 2 tiny anchors dena.
text: Sone se pehle do anchors: kal ka first task pin karo, aur 6-hour sleep window set kar do.

speaker: Seeker
text: Done, dono set kar diya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se initial collapse se current stability ka shift mirror karna.
text: Jahan se tum full worthlessness mein atak gaye the, wahan se ab tumne stable steps build kar liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aaj enough hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final reassurance with worth-outcome separation dena.
text: Tumne bahut heavy pressure ke beech bhi sambhalne wale kadam liye. Aaj ka apmaan tumhari poori keemat ka sach nahi hai.
